news.headline: FreightCar America, Inc. to present at LD Micro Conference on Oct. 29, 2024 in Los Angeles, for investors.
news.summary: A company known as FreightCar America, Inc. (NASDAQ: RAIL) recently shared that they will be taking part in the LD Micro Main Event XVII, set to take place on October 29, 2024 in Los Angeles. This event will provide them with the opportunity to present and engage in individual meetings with investors. FreightCar America is recognized as a producer and provider of railroad freight cars, along with railcar components and parts. This offers them a valuable platform to connect with potential investors and showcase their offerings.

news.headline: CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) to acquire Visual Lease, a lease administration platform. Enhances Real Estate Manager business, targets corporations.
news.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), a prominent provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, and analytics, has announced its agreement to acquire Visual Lease, a leading software platform for lease management and accounting. This strategic move aims to bolster CoStar Group’s Real Estate Manager business line and offer enhanced services to corporations of various sizes. Visual Lease, established in 1996, will bring added value to lease management and accounting processes through this acquisition.

news.headline: Keel appoints new CFO and COO to drive business growth and expansion in Ladson, SC.
news.summary: LADSON, S.C., Keel announced the appointment of a new Chief Financial Officer and Chief Operating Officer to enhance the leadership team. This move aims to bolster the company's business infrastructure and facilitate capacity expansion.

news.headline: AMCON Distributing Company declares $0.18 quarterly dividend, payable to shareholders on November 13, 2024.
news.summary: AMCON Distributing Company, a Convenience and Foodservice Distributor based in Omaha, Nebraska, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per common share. The dividend is payable on November 13, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 4, 2024. AMCON, along with its subsidiaries Team Sledd, LLC and Henry’s Foods, Inc., is a prominent player in the industry.

news.headline: National Bank Holdings Corp reported Q3 net income of $33.1M, EPS $0.86, ROA 1.32%, and increased dividend to $0.29 per share. Loan portfolio remained stable at $7.7B with notable financial performance improvements from Q2, driven by net interest income and fee income growth. Non-performing loans ratio decreased to 0.31% at Sep 30, 2024. Quarterly cash dividend increased by 3.6%. Company shows strength in capital ratios: common equity tier 1 ratio of 12.88%. Total assets stood at $9,993M with $8,497M in total transaction deposits. Tangible common book value per share was $24.91.
news.summary: National Bank Holdings Corporation (NBHC) reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2024, with net income increasing by $7 million to $33.1 million compared to the previous quarter. Earnings per diluted share were $0.86, and return on average tangible common equity was 14.84%. Total assets amounted to $9.99 billion, with total deposits of $8.5 billion. Loan balances remained at $7.7 billion. The company recorded $2 million of provision expense for credit losses, with non-performing loans decreasing to 0.31% of total loans. Shareholders' equity was $1.29 billion, with common book value per share at $34.01 and tangible common book value per share at $24.91. NBHC announced a 3.6% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.29 per share. The company also highlighted its disciplined loan and deposit pricing approach and diverse revenue streams as key drivers of performance. Overall, the company remains well-capitalized with strong liquidity.

news.headline: Maplewood Senior Living wins Silver in 2024 McKnight's Tech Awards for Fall Prevention with SafelyYou.
news.summary: Maplewood Senior Living, a prominent luxury senior living provider based in SOUTHPORT, Conn., has recently received recognition for its collaboration with SafelyYou. The partnership was honored with a Silver medal in the "Fall Prevention, Management, or Detection" category at an event on Oct. 22, 2024. This prestigious award was presented as part of the McKnight's program, highlighting Maplewood's commitment to enhancing safety and well-being for seniors.

news.headline: Gold mining stocks hit August 2020 highs with a 9-day winning streak. Gold prices rose to $2,744/ounce. Analysts suggest adding gold exposure for a diversified portfolio amid geopolitical risks.
news.summary: The VanEck Gold Miners ETF (NYSE:GDX) has been on a winning streak, with nine consecutive sessions of gains, bringing them to their highest levels since August 2020. This marks the longest period of gains for gold miners in over three years, fueled by strong investor demand and rising gold prices. Gold prices surged by 0.9% to $2,744 per ounce on Tuesday, setting new record highs and boosting confidence in precious metals. Imaru Casanova, a portfolio manager at VanEck specializing in gold and precious metals, advised that now is an opportune time to increase gold exposure, emphasizing gold as a foundational element rather than a tactical move in a diversified portfolio. Casanova highlighted the importance of gold as a permanent allocation, especially given the current landscape of increasing geopolitical and economic uncertainties. The gold miners are setting their sights on reaching record highs as they continue their upward trajectory.

news.headline: "Live event & podcast 'House of War' by Daniel Sadan debuts this week. Explores radical Islamism & Muslim Brotherhood impact on West. GAITHERSBURG, Md., Oct 22, 2024"
news.summary: Analyzing the influence of radical Islamism, focusing on the Muslim Brotherhood's threat to the Western world, a recent event in Gaithersburg, Maryland on October 22, 2024, witnessed Daniel Sadan, a U.S. businessman and Executive Producer, revealing plans for House of War. This new venture encompasses live events and podcasts, aiming to delve into the concerning issues surrounding Islamic extremism. The House of War series is anticipated to shed light on critical aspects, attracting attention and engagement from the audience.

news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Denver, it was reported by National Bank Holdings Corporation (NYSE: NBHC) that...

news.headline: Seagate Technology's Fiscal Q1 2025 results show high gross margin in over a decade, CEO pleased with start.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX) announced its financial results for the fiscal first quarter ending on September 27, 2024. The company, known for its mass-capacity data storage solutions, reported a strong start to the fiscal year. CEO Dave Mosley mentioned that Seagate achieved its highest gross margin in over a decade. The company successfully implemented strategies to increase production of its 28- technology, showing positive early results.

news.headline: James Fay joins Mitek Systems Board of Directors and Audit Committee, bringing 20+ years of financial expertise from Matterport.
news.summary: A San Diego digital identity verification company, Mitek Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MITK), welcomed James Fay to its board of directors. Fay, also the CFO at Matterport, Inc. (NASDAQ: MTTR), brings 20+ years of financial and operational experience. He will join Mitek's audit committee.

news.headline: Hello Heart expands into government markets to support public sector health benefits, with significant traction.
news.summary: A company based in Menlo Park, California known as Hello Heart has reported notable progress in the public sector health benefits industry.

news.headline: CoStar Group Q3 revenue up 11% YoY to $693M; Net income increased 176%, EBITDA up 320% from Q2.
news.summary: CoStar Group, Inc. reported a revenue of $693 million for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, showing an 11% increase from $625 million in the same period in 2023. The net income for Q3 2024 was $53 million, marking a significant 176% rise from the previous quarter. The net income per diluted share stood at $0.13. CoStar Group, Inc. is a renowned provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, and analytics in the property sector.

news.headline: Watsco (NYSE: WSO) to announce earnings with estimated EPS of $4.76. Historical EPS performance shows slight misses. Shares up 43.65% in 52-week period. Analyst consensus: Outperform, with $499.0 target, 1.38% upside potential.

Investors are eager to see if the company will exceed estimates and provide positive guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can significantly impact stock prices. In the last quarter, Watsco's EPS missed by $0.18, causing a 1.74% share price increase the next day. As of October 21, Watsco's shares were trading at $492.22, up 43.65% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts rate Watsco as Outperform, with an average price target of $499.0, suggesting a 1.38% upside potential. Such positive returns may indicate bullish sentiment among long-term shareholders.

Goosehead's stock was trading at $96.4 on October 21, with a 52-week increase of 40.69%. Analysts are closely watching the company, with 12 ratings received. news.summary: Santa Clara, California - On October 22, 2024, SI-BONE, Inc. news.headline: Starbucks increases quarterly cash dividend from $0.57 to $0.61 per share, raising annual dividend rate to $2.44 per share.
news.summary: In Seattle, Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) revealed a boost in its quarterly cash dividend from $0.57 to $0.61 per share of outstanding Common Stock. The new dividend rate of $0.61 will take effect from the dividend payable on November 29, 2024. Shareholders of record on November 15, 2024, will be eligible for this increased dividend, which raises the annual dividend rate to $2.44 per share. Starbucks first introduced its dividend in 2010 at $0.05 per share of outstanding Common Stock.

news.headline: USANA reports Q3 2024 results with $200M net sales and $0.56 diluted EPS. Updates FY 2024 outlook to $850M net sales and $2.45 EPS.
news.summary: USANA Health Sciences, Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal third quarter ending on September 28, 2024. Net sales in the third quarter stood at $200 million, a decrease from $213 million in Q3 2023. Diluted EPS for the third quarter was reported at $0.56, down from $0.59 in Q3 2023. The company has revised its net sales and diluted EPS forecast for fiscal year 2024 to around $850 million and $2.45, respectively, which were previously anticipated to be $850 million.

news.headline: Starbucks releases preliminary Q4 and full fiscal year 2024 results; global comp store sales declined.
news.summary: In Seattle today, Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) released its preliminary financial results for the 13-week fiscal fourth quarter and 52-week fiscal year ending on September 29, 2024. The GAAP results for fiscal years 2024 and 2023 incorporate certain items that are excluded from the non-GAAP results. For a detailed breakdown, kindly check the reconciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP measures provided at the conclusion of this statement. In the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024, global comparable store sales experienced a decrease.

news.headline: Foster Grant launches limited-edition Wicked x Foster Grant sunglasses collection inspired by the film, Wicked.
news.summary: Foster Grant, a prominent over-the-counter eyewear brand, headquartered in Smithfield, RI, has excitedly launched the limited-edition Wicked x Foster Grant sunglasses collection. The collection is inspired by the upcoming film, "Wicked," by Universal Pictures. The unique eyewear is designed to embody the fantastical and vibrant nature of the movie's main characters, Elphaba and Glinda. This exclusive line allows fans to showcase their adoration for the world of Wicked.

news.headline: Boise Cascade Company will discuss Q3 2024 earnings in a webcast on Nov 5, 2024, at 10 a.m. Eastern. Visit bc.com/investors for more info.
news.summary: Boise Cascade Company (NYSE: BCC) has scheduled a webcast and conference call for discussing third quarter earnings in 2024 on Tuesday, November 5th, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time. To participate in the webcast, individuals can visit the Investors section on the website www.bc.com/investors and choose the Event Calendar link. Those analysts and investors interested in asking questions during the Q&A session should register for the call. The archived webcast will be accessible in the Investors section of Boise's website.

news.summary: Enphase Energy, Inc., based in Fremont, California, disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024. As a prominent player in the energy technology sector and the primary provider of microinverter-based solar and battery systems globally, the company's President and CEO, Badri Kothandaraman, highlighted key points from the financial report. The company is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol ENPH. The specifics of the financial results, such as revenue, profits, and any other pertinent figures, were not mentioned in the brief.

news.headline: Alison Moore, Ph.D., joins Artiva Biotherapeutics' Board of Directors.

news.summary: The Board of Directors of Capital Clean Energy Carriers Corp. (NASDAQ: CCEC) has announced the calling of the annual shareholders meeting to be conducted in Greece on December 5, 2024, at 11:30 am local time. Shareholders as of November 4, 2024, will be able to attend and vote at the Annual Meeting or any adjournments. Shareholders will receive notification, the proxy statement, and the Annual Report on Form 20-F. The documents can also be found on the Corporation's website at http://ir.capitalcleanenergycarriers.com/. Shareholders can cast their votes through www.proxyvote.com using the proxy card.

news.headline: Utthunga appoints Praveen Naik as Senior VP - Americas, to lead industrial innovation. Joining with 18 years of experience.
news.summary: Utthunga, a prominent company specializing in engineering R&D, Industrial Solutions, and Digital Transformation Solutions, has revealed the selection of Praveen Naik as the Senior Vice President and Head of Americas Business. Naik, who boasts more than 18 years of experience, will be entrusted with leading the business operations in the Americas region. This strategic appointment aims to strengthen Utthunga's presence and operations, showcasing the company's commitment to growth and innovation.

news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, OraSure Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSUR) announced that they will be hosting their quarterly earnings conference call to discuss the financial results and key business updates for the third quarter of 2024. The call is scheduled for November 6, 2024, at 5 p.m. ET. This conference call will provide insights into the company's performance during this period and offer information on any notable developments within the business.

news.headline: Robert Half Inc. (NYSE: RHI) Q3 2024 report: Net income $65M, $0.64 per share, revenues $1.465B.
news.summary: Robert Half Inc. announced its financial results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2024, at its Menlo Park headquarters. The company reported a net income of $65 million, equivalent to $0.64 per share. Total revenues for the quarter reached $1.465 billion.

news.headline: Elcora update: MCTO granted on July 30, 2024 due to delayed financial statements. Interim Filings due on Aug 29, 2024.
news.summary: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, as of October 22, 2024, Elcora Advanced Materials Corp. (TSX.V: ERA | Frankfurt: ELM | OTCQB: ECORF) has issued an update regarding the management cease trade order (MCTO) granted on July 30, 2024. The MCTO was provided by the Nova Scotia Securities Commission under National Policy 12-203 due to delays in filing financial reports. Elcora previously announced on July 12, 2024, and July 30, 2024, that there would be delays in submitting the financial statements and management’s discussion and analysis for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2024 (Annual Filings) as per Canadian securities laws. Subsequently, there has been a delay in filing the Company’s interim financial statements for the period ended June 30, 2024 (Interim Filings) which were expected by August 29, 2024.

news.headline: Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. to release Q3 earnings on Nov 5, 2024, and host conference call at 1:30pm PT.
news.summary: A retail company, Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: GO), will report its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal 2024 on November 5, 2024. The results will be released after the market closes, followed by a conference call at 4:30pm ET (1:30pm PT) on the same day to discuss the figures. This announcement was made from Emeryville, California.

news.headline: Gyre Therapeutics completes Phase 3 trial for F351 in CHB liver fibrosis, significant progress in treatment development.
news.summary: Gyre Therapeutics has revealed that the final participant has finished the crucial Phase 3 trial assessing the effectiveness of their drug F351 in treating liver fibrosis associated with chronic hepatitis B (CHB). This marks a significant milestone for the company as they move closer to potentially offering a new treatment option for individuals affected by CHB-related liver fibrosis. The completion of this trial brings the total number of participants in the study to a noteworthy figure, showcasing the thoroughness of the research conducted. Gyre Therapeutics is now gearing up to analyze the data collected from this pivotal trial, with expectations of unveiling the outcomes and potential benefits of F351 in the near future.

news.headline: VirTra adds retired U.S. Army Lt. Gen. Maria Gervais and Georgia POST Executive Director Mike Ayers to Board of Directors.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Chandler, Arizona, VirTra, Inc. (Nasdaq: VTSI), a prominent provider of use-of-force and firearms training simulators for law enforcement and military sectors globally, revealed the addition of two esteemed individuals to its board of directors. Retired U.S. Army Lieutenant General Maria R. Gervais and Executive Director Mike Ayers from the Georgia Peace Officer Standards and Training (POST) Council have been appointed. Their appointment, effective as of October 21, 2024, brings extensive military operations and police training expertise to the board.

news.headline: NeuroPace (NPCE) to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 12, 2024, after market close. Earnings call at 1:30 pm PT / 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Mountain View, California, NeuroPace, Inc. (Nasdaq: NPCE) disclosed plans to release its financial report for the third quarter of 2024 post market closure on November 12, 2024. news.headline: AvePoint (NASDAQ: AVPT) to reveal Q3 2024 financials on Nov. 7. Results post-market on that day.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Jersey City-based AvePoint, a prominent company in data management and governance, announced that it will release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 after the US financial markets shut down on Thursday, November 7, 2024. AvePoint is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AVPT. This report will offer insights into the company's performance and financial standing during the specified period, providing valuable information to investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Stock market closes with little change; S&P 500 records first consecutive losses since start of September.
Dynagas LNG Partners declares $0.5625 cash distribution per unit on Series A Preferred Units from August 12 to November 11, 2024.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece on Oct. 22, 2024, Dynagas LNG Partners LP shared news about a cash distribution for its Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units. These units (NYSE: DLNG PR A) will receive $0.5625 per unit for the period between August 12, 2024, and November 11, 2024. Dynagas LNG Partners LP, operating LNG carriers, made this announcement following a decision by its Board of Directors.

news.headline: Hanmi Financial Corp (NASDAQ: HAFC) reveals 2024 third quarter results for Hanmi Bank.
news.summary: Hanmi Financial Corporation, the parent company of Hanmi Bank, disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 in Los Angeles on October 22. Traded as NASDAQ: HAFC, the corporation presented its quarterly results without specifying the details.

news.headline: Arvinas hosts 3rd annual Impact Day, 16 states join for community service in Greater New Haven area. #ARVN #biotech
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in New Haven, Connecticut, Arvinas, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARVN), a biotech company in the clinical stage, revealed that staff from 16 states partook in the third yearly “Arvinas Impact Day.” This event is a company-wide initiative focused on serving the community through volunteer work. Employees came together to engage in volunteer activities that had a positive impact on the Greater New Haven area and other locations.

news.headline: Postal Realty Trust (NYSE: PSTL) declares $0.24 per share dividend, a 1.1% increase from Q3 2023, payable on Nov 29, 2024.
news.summary: CEDARHURST, N.Y., Oct. 22, 2024 - Postal Realty Trust, Inc. stated that its board of directors sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.24 per share on the Company’s Class A common stock, marking a 1.1% boost from the previous year. This real estate investment trust, managing over 2,000 USPS-leased properties, ranging from post offices to industrial sites, disclosed this dividend increment from the third quarter of 2023. The payment is scheduled for November 29, 2024, for stockholders recorded as of November 4, 2024.

news.headline: TELA Bio plans public offering of common stock with pre-funded warrants, offering underwriters 15% additional shares.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, TELA Bio, Inc., a company specializing in soft-tissue reconstruction, announced the initiation of an underwritten public offering. This offering includes shares of common stock and pre-funded warrants for the purchase of common stock. TELA intends to grant underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 15% more of the securities at the public offering price. All common stock and warrants are offered by TELA. The completion of the offering is dependent on market and other conditions, with uncertainties regarding timing, size, and terms of the offering.

news.headline: TFI International retires board director Neil Manning after 11 years, effective Oct 22, 2024.
news.summary: Montreal-based TFI International Inc. (NYSE and TSX: TFII) released a statement on October 22, 2024, reporting the retirement of independent director Neil Manning. Manning served on the Company's Board for 11 years, marking the end of his tenure. TFI International is prominent in the transportation and logistics sector across North America.

news.headline: CN declared a Q4 2024 dividend of C$0.8450 per common share, payable on Dec 30, 2024, to shareholders of record on Dec 9.
news.summary: In Montreal, on October 22, 2024, CN (TSX: CNR) (NYSE: CNI) disclosed that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a fourth-quarter 2024 dividend for the Company’s common shares. The approved amount is eighty-four and a half cents (C$0.8450) per common share, scheduled to be disbursed on December 30, 2024, to shareholders recorded as of the end of business on December 9, 2024.

news.headline: Skyworks will release Q4 fiscal 2024 results on Nov 12, 2024, with a conference call at 4:30 p.m. EST. (Words: 29)
news.summary: Skyworks Solutions, Inc., a leading provider of high-performance analog and mixed-signal semiconductors enabling connectivity, is set to conduct a conference call with analysts to review its fourth quarter fiscal 2024 outcomes and future prospects on November 12, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. EST. Following the market closure on the same day, the company will release its earnings press release through Business Wire. Skyworks Solutions, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq as SWKS.
